title: ajuga genevensis
intro: Ajuga genevensis, also known as Bugle or Bugloss, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and parts of Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ajuga genevensis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
